SINOPSIS OFICIAL (Google Books):

Man of the future, In this transmission, we will reveal 5 biological virtues representing privileged power, 3 intentions marking an intelligently beneficial direction, 3 means adding grand strength to each step, 11 imminent dangers we must avoid at all costs, and 11 possibilities showing us a fertile and profoundly captivating port. All this will let you understand that we must act urgently and be conscious partners in the next evolutionary leap as a species. Homo creativus, our potential genetic heir, are exceptionally strong, brilliant, empathetic, intelligent biological beings capable of shaping a fascinating future with their thoughts. In short, they have conquered their spirit and observable existence, which has opened the doors to a future full of Life, wisdom, orderly creation, freedom from suffering, eudemonia (complete happiness), peace, and reunion with what inspires us most endearingly. Man of the future, I hope this message doesn't come too late...

METADATA VERIFICADA:
- Título: Homo Creativus
- Autor: Juan Carlos Chávez
- Año: 2024
- Editorial: Independently Published
- Categorías: Self-Help
